posts.author: catsfive
posts.title: WHITE WASHING: Florida Department of Corrections classified over 40,000 inmates with Hispanic surnames as white despite photos showing otherwise in move to alter crime statistics data across the state system

twitter.content:
The Florida Department of Corrections classified over 40,000 inmates with Hispanic surnames (not to mention photos) as WHITE. 

You know why this is being done. 

It's WIDESPREAD.

posts.author: flp999
posts.title: NY Post Editorial: "You Need to Steal 300 Gold Bars Before the CIA Even Checks Your Resumé?" The guy's whole resume was fake and the CIA never checked it, not when they hired him or in the 15 years he worked there.

link_metadata.description: How can anyone trust the CIA to get anything right after this?
link_metadata.title: You need to steal 300 gold bars before the CIA even checks your resumé?

posts.author: catsfive
posts.title: YOU HAD ONE JOB, WINCHESTER! Man disappointed that Winchester Repeating Arms skipped production of any commemorative 250th anniversary 30-30 rifle after releasing the 1976 Bicentennial model he received from his father as a child.

twitter.content:
My single biggest complaint about our 250th birthday as a nation is aimed directly at Winchester.

In 1976, my dad bought me the commemorative Winchester Bicentennial 30-30, the “rifle that won the West.” It’s still mint in box, although the box is a bit worn.

For two decades,
